hook_3s: Did you know most brands lie about 'body-safe' claims?
script_voiceover: Did you know most brands lie about 'body-safe' claims? Many wellness products marketed as safe aren't truly body-safe. The truth is, 'body-safe' means non-porous materials like medical-grade silicone or glass, free from phthalates, parabens, and other harmful chemicals. Porous materials can harbor bacteria, even after cleaning, posing real risks. Don't fall for vague marketing. Always check the material and ingredients list. For a deeper dive into true intimacy wellness, follow us for more insights.
